title: FuncApproxNats
description: NATS subjects owned by dd-func-approx-rs (Eureqa-style function approximator: genetic-programming symbolic regression, backprop and neuroevolved MLPs, and closed-form polynomial least squares). The server subscribes to fit requests under the dd-func-approx-rs queue group, publishes the discovered model — an analytic equation with its Pareto front and symbolic derivatives, or an MLP/polynomial spec — plus runtime events. Payloads carry a funcapprox.fit.v1 schemaVersion envelope and must not contain secrets.

$dd:nats.summary: Function-approximation (symbolic regression / neural / evolutionary) request/result pipeline.

subjects.name: FuncApproxFitRequests
subjects.description: Inbound function-approximation requests (a dataset plus an optional method and config) consumed by the approximator. Subscribed with the dd-func-approx-rs queue group so requests load-balance across replicas. Default for FUNC_APPROX_FIT_SUBJECT.
subjects.subject: dd.remote.funcapprox.fit.requests

subjects.name: FuncApproxFitResults
subjects.description: Discovered models emitted by the approximator: an analytic equation with its accuracy/complexity Pareto front and symbolic derivatives, or an MLP / polynomial specification, with train/validation metrics. Carries a funcapprox.fit.v1 envelope. Default for FUNC_APPROX_RESULT_SUBJECT.
subjects.subject: dd.remote.funcapprox.fit.results

queueGroups.name: FuncApproxQueueGroup
queueGroups.description: Shared queue group used by dd-func-approx-rs replicas consuming fit requests.
